programme.desc: Dad gives Tiny and Buddy a mystery feather. The kids are detectives on the Dinosaur Train.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Checking the Boxes/ Batteries Not Included
programme.desc: Sally and Nick wrap Father's Day gifts, but when they get mixed they can't tell which is which.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: Cassidy goes undercover for the I.A.B. when a cop accuses his precinct of corruption and sexual abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Betrayal's Climax
programme.desc: A teenage girl is reported missing by her parents, and detectives finds signs of a party turned violent. Her boyfriend, a scholarship student, seems to be involved in a dangerous gang. When he refuses to talk, he is quickly arrested.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Institutional Fail
programme.desc: A starving toddler is found wandering the streets alone and leads detectives to a house where they find a second child in grave condition. They question the children's caseworker and discover the kids have not been checked in on in months.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Man Up
programme.desc: Teenager Sam Conway shows evidence of rape but refuses to name his attacker. Benson and Rollins confess to some major life changes.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Man Down
programme.desc: ADA Stone blames himself for the shocking verdict in Sam's case and before Benson can offer help, Sam makes a tragic decision.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Zero Tolerance
programme.desc: Benson and Stone take drastic measures to reunite a young girl rescued from a sex trafficker with her mother. Rollins gives her rocky relationship another chance.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mistery Date
programme.desc: When Claire takes Manny and Luke along to Alex's academic decathlon for the weekend, Phil attempts to throw together a boys' night at the house, inviting a fellow Bulldog alum he just met.

programme.title: Modern Family: When a Tree Falls
programme.desc: With some urging, Mitch joins in on Cam's efforts to save an old tree in the park.

programme.title: Modern Family: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Manny and Luke's little league team unexpectedly makes it into a playoff game, so Claire and Cameron scramble to find a location and decide to do a makeover on a rundown field.

programme.title: Modern Family: New Year's Eve
programme.desc: The family goes to a hotel in Palm Springs to celebrate New Year's, which turns out to be less than stellar. Everyone ends up doing their own thing, and Jay runs into Billy Dee Williams. Meanwhile at home, Haley and Alex watch over the kids.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wanderlust
programme.desc: When a travel writer is murdered, her landlord's pedophiliac boyfriend is suspected.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Tangled
programme.desc: When a prominent doctor is murdered and his wife raped, their estranged son is suspected.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mean
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is murdered, detectives discover the victim was a high school bully.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Influence
programme.desc: Former rock star Derek Lord goes on a national talk show and lectures about the abuse of psychiatric drugs. Meanwhile, an unstable young woman heeds his advice and as a result, she stops taking her medication and ends up killing 10 people in a car crash.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Paternity
programme.desc: When a family's nanny is found gruesomely murdered, the obvious suspect is her Internet love interest. It soon becomes apparent that her employers are hiding some dark secrets, and the investigation leads to a case of murder and infidelity.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Frame by Frame
programme.desc: The team investigates a homicide in the home of a reclusive former casino mogul who was a suspect in a similar crime in 2000. The team needs to recall who they were and where they were in order to solve the cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Greed
programme.desc: When navy ID is found on a dead body tied to a hazardous materials smuggling case, NCIS is granted permission to investigate in Mexico and is asked to help locate the missing materials.

programme.title: NCIS: Death From Above
programme.desc: The NCIS headquarters are evacuated after bomb materials and a body are discovered on the roof above the squad room. Also, the team reads the first draft of Ducky's book.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A gang from El Salvador infiltrates Chicago and Intelligence works with a visiting detective to put an end to the crew's brutal tactics. Antonio finds himself getting close to the Salvadorian detective Marcella Gomez but learns she has a hidden motive.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Anthem
programme.desc: A basketball star is murdered after an anti-police rally and Intelligence navigates a politically charged environment to track the killer. Woods' daughter Brianna gets tangled up in the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sisterhood
programme.desc: Intelligence tracks a vigilante killing rapists. The investigation hits home for Burgess who begins to question if the men who attacked her sister truly paid for their actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Profiles
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a series of bombings targeting members of the media and enlists Firehouse 51 to help examine the devices and prevent the next attack.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Breaking Point
programme.desc: When a prominent Alderman known for urban revitalization efforts is killed, Intelligence looks into corruption in the neighborhood. Olinsky feels pressure after receiving an ultimatum from Woods.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ghosts
programme.desc: Upton uses an old undercover identity to help take down a meth ring spearheaded by a former criminal contact. With pressure from Woods mounting, Voight calls in a favor from Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Payback
programme.desc: A string of stash house robberies lead back to an unlikely individual. Voight confronts a key witness in the Bingham investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Saved
programme.desc: Voight witnesses the kidnapping of a young woman with a mysterious connection to his past. Intelligence works to find a connection between her kidnapping and several bank robberies. Ruzek gets a tip that a grand jury has been summoned.

programme.title: Movie: Iron Man
programme.desc: After a wealthy weapons developer faces a live-threatening incident, he creates a suit of high tech armour to fix the mistakes he's made and defend the innocent against evil.

programme.desc: Neil Patrick Harris hosts a star-studded tour of Disneyland's Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge.

programme.title: The Middle: Pilot
programme.desc: Frankie is struggling in her career as a car salesperson because she has failed to actually sell a car. Sue has auditioned for show choir and, to everyone's shock, makes the team, but fails to mention that she's part of the stage crew.

programme.title: The Middle: The Cheerleader
programme.desc: Frankie tries to save her job by organizing a publicity stunt involving a car filled with jellybeans. Meanwhile, Sue fails swim team tryouts and Brick can't check books out of the library so he begins to read his mother's steamy romance novels.

programme.title: The Middle: The Floating Anniversary
programme.desc: Frankie and Mike's romantic plans for their anniversary are thwarted by a sick Brick, a lovesick Sue, a learner's permit-toting Axl, two crazy aunts and their diaper-wearing dog.

programme.title: The Middle: The Trip
programme.desc: Meek daughter, Sue, finally succeeds in doing something right by selling thousands of dollars' worth of sausage and cheese samples for the school, which makes her eligible to travel to the state capitol.

programme.title: The Middle: The Block Party
programme.desc: Brick's teachers tell Frankie and Mike that Brick tested as 'socially challenged,' so Mike thinks that enrolling him in basketball is the answer until he enters a lawn-mowing contest and discovers that Brick's real talent is souping up machines.

programme.title: Movie: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: A young orphaned boy raised by a community of subterranean, junk-collecting tinkers must save his friends from a nasty exterminator bent on wiping them off the map.

programme.title: The Middle: Halloween VII: The Heckoning
programme.desc: As Halloween approaches, Frankie is taken aback when she discovers that if the circumstances ever arose where she and Mike got divorced, the kids would all choose to live with Mike.

programme.title: The Middle: True Grit
programme.desc: Sue has had enough of boyfriend Jeremy and wants to break up with him. But not knowing how to do it, she asks Axl for some of his worldly advice. Meanwhile, Brick tries his best to show school spirit and fit in with his fellow high schoolers.

programme.title: The Middle: Roadkill
programme.desc: Frankie and Mike are embarrassed to admit that they once again forgot Brick's birthday, but their embarrassment turns to fright when they discover that he has turned 15, and it's time for them to teach their not-so-sure-footed son driver's ed.

programme.title: The Middle: Thanksgiving VIII
programme.desc: Frankie has come to the conclusion that April is not good enough for Axl and does everything in her power to keep her out of their annual Christmas family photo.

programme.title: The Middle: Look Who's Not Talking
programme.desc: Although excited about finding a new discount store that sells oddly shaped fruits and vegetables, Frankie is devastated when Axl refuses to talk to her or even answer her texts after inadvertently admitting how she feels about April in front of him.

programme.title: The Middle: Trip and Fall
programme.desc: Trashy neighbour Rita Glossner talks an apprehensive Frankie into taking a road trip to an unknown destination. Mike takes an embarrassing fall at the quarry and has to deal with even more embarrassment when OSHA is called in to investigate.

programme.title: The Middle: A Very Marry Christmas
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Sue is forced to keep a huge secret from the family; after agreeing to watch the neighbour's three kids, Brick finds himself trying to hide from them, as they had such a good time that they keep wanting to come over and play.

programme.title: Movie: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory

programme.title: Movie: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice

programme.desc: After saving the city once again, Batman's ego is at a new high. However, when The Joker sets off his plan to take over Gotham City, Batman realizes he needs help to stop The Joker. Going on a personal journey, he discovers the need for friendship.

programme.title: Movie: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice

programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: An accident happens when Martin and Gina are caring for Mama Payne's beloved parrot.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: For Sale by Owner
programme.desc: The Banks family is offered a large sum of money by a client who wants to buy their house.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: While vacationing in Will's hometown, the Banks family learns a secret about Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Client
programme.desc: Will discovers that Ashley has the gift of singing and pursues a music career for her.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: What's Will Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Will starts wheeling and dealing as Ashley's manager until she develops an enormous ego.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: In order to get next to a computer expert whose new discovery may place national security at risk, Malcolm Turner must once again impersonate his grandmother. He poses as the hacker's nanny, but things get complicated when he gets close to the family.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: Things are going well for Calvin, Eddie and the rest of the crew at Calvin's Barbershop, but their neighbourhood is taking a turn for the worse. With gang members roaming the streets, the crew needs to work together to save the shop and the community.

programme.title: Love and Hip Hop Hollywood: Dogged Out
programme.desc: Princess and Ray J are devastated when their dog goes missing. Jason Lee's showcase brings the drama on and off the stage. Micky's ex has an awkward run in with his new girl. Fizz and Apryl's friends begin to worry about the duo's relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: A woman fosters a retired military dog, while recovering from her broken engagement. When the dog's trainer returns home to claim his pup, she finds just what she looking for to mend her broken heart.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: A woman is focused on taking over her family business, instead of looking for a man. All her friends are getting married and she seems to get new invitations in the mail weekly. While at a wedding, she meets a documentarian, and he changes her life.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Watercolors, Wishes, and Weddings
programme.desc: Mick and Megan celebrate their old life, Kevin and Sarah cherish their new one, Jess and David await the start of theirs. With Connor and Bree's careers in flux, Trace and Abby confront their future as well as their future together.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Dance

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation

programme.title: Frasier: Room Service
programme.desc: Lilith makes a surprise visit and is distraught that her husband has left her for another man. Frasier fears he is weak to Lilith's beauty and asks Niles to keep him way from her. The next morning, however, Niles and Lilith awaken in bed together.

programme.title: Frasier: Beware of Greeks
programme.desc: The Cranes are reunited with a branch of the family when a cousin is getting married. But first, Frasier must soothe old wounds with Martin's sister-in-law, which incurred after Frasier urged his cousin to study juggling instead of medicine.

programme.title: Frasier: The Perfect Guy
programme.desc: The radio station hires a new health expert, who seems perfect in every way. Frasier tries desperately to find Dr. Clint Webber's flaw, while Martin gets thrown out of the only store that carries Eddie's favourite dog food.

programme.title: Frasier: Bad Dog
programme.desc: Much to Frasier's chagrin, Bulldog becomes a hero during an attempted armed robbery.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Frasier has trouble accepting that his relationship is built on physical attraction.

programme.title: Frasier: First Date
programme.desc: Niles finally takes the initiative to ask Daphne out and Frasier gets hooked on a 'soap.'

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy and Ethel Buy the Same Dress
programme.desc: The girls are thrilled about appearing on TV, but they both show up in the same dress.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Equal Rights
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel manage to get their husbands to agree with equal rights.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Baby Pictures
programme.desc: The Ricardos vow to not show off Ricky's baby pictures, but their resolve weakens.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Tells the Truth
programme.desc: Lucy vows to tell the truth for 24 hours in order to win a bet.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Flu Attack (aka The Flu)
programme.desc: A week before an awards ceremony, Blanche, Dorothy and Rose each come down with a nasty flu, which compounds their arguing over who will win a prestigious award.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: The Closer: Slippin'
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson investigates the shooting of three youngsters. The shooting has all the marks of a gang related crime. Meanwhile Brenda must deal with her mother.

programme.title: The Closer: Aftertaste

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Fatal Fence Feud
programme.desc: Even after Lonnie Paul Tracey erected a giant barricade between him and his neighbor Tony Davis, no one ever dreamed their ongoing arguments would escalate to murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance
programme.desc: When a Tennessee man is shot down in front of his own home, police use home video to unravel the history of a vicious feud between rural neighbours and determine if the shooting was self-defence or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deerly Departed
programme.desc: A night of shooting begins in a quiet suburb, and when police speak to the man responsible they find he became unraveled over the sight of a few too many deer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl
programme.desc: When a mother and recovering addict is stabbed while standing up to the neighborhood bully, grainy video and unreliable witnesses stand in the way of investigators determining who was holding the knife that killed her.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mother vs. Texas
programme.desc: A mother is charged and sent to Death Row for allegedly murdering her two young boys in their Dallas area home.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl
programme.desc: When a mother and recovering addict is stabbed while standing up to the neighborhood bully, grainy video and unreliable witnesses stand in the way of investigators determining who was holding the knife that killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Cabin Fever
Alaska: The Last Frontier: Cabin Fever
Alaska: The Last Frontier: Cabin Fever: Episode 3
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier extras: Jewel returns to the Homefront to help Atz Sr. wrangle some cattle. Otto and the boys are busy working on the construction of Shane's cabin. And Atz Lee and Jane discover signs of an aggressive bear.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Cabin Fever: Episode 4
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier extras: As winter quickly approaches the Homefront, the Kilchers race to finish some of their biggest projects yet. Otto's team is working to move the Octagon house safely, while Shane's cabin is nearly complete.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Ways of the Wilderness
programme.desc: After eight decades on the homestead, the Kilcher clan continues to thrive. Now, the family is revealing the valuable lessons, techniques and special skills they've acquired that allow them to flourish in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wisconsin Washout
programme.desc: Marty takes on a huge diverter trench to deflect torrents of storm water from devasting the homestead of musician Lou and his girlfriend Stacy. But a storm is the forecast, so no one can predict if this rescue will succeed.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Ways of the Wilderness
programme.desc: After eight decades on the homestead, the Kilcher clan continues to thrive. Now, the family is revealing the valuable lessons, techniques and special skills they've acquired that allow them to flourish in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bear Bait
programme.desc: The Raneys must save a unique family of homesteaders themselves. Marty and Matt are building a new homestead on 40 acres of virgin wilderness. After an early bear encounter, father and son realise they'll need every ounce of off-grid skill and ingenuity.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Bracing for Change
programme.desc: Fall brings big changes to the homestead. Tensions flare between Otto and August in their last mission before August leaves for college. Atz Lee, Sr., and Jane work on Atz Lee's new cabin, but Jane still has doubts. Eivin builds a special surprise.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After eight months of winter, the Kilchers have cabin fever. Eivin and Atz Lee get caught overnight in the backcountry while hunting small game. Otto struggles to get an orphan calf to connect with an unwilling mother. And there's much to do with poo.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Father-Son Ingenuity
programme.desc: Before the spring thaw floods the area, Atz Sr. and his sons build a bridge across a river using chainsaws and fallen logs. Otto and Eivin create two amphibious crafts from their ATVs. Meanwhile, Atz Lee and Jane build a new smokehouse.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Beast of Burden
programme.desc: With JJ going back to old school rules and a total of $60,000 on the line, the racers do anything and everything to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Smoked in Memphis
programme.desc: The 405 heads Memphis, bringing everyone with them. However, that means racing on JJ's slick, asphalt road. When the 405's plan to stick together falls apart, they struggle to set up the right races and it looks like Memphis might get the best of them.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Memphis Against the World
programme.desc: Welcome to Memphis, where JJ and his family of racers do things a little differently. When JJ invites some of the biggest names in street racing to come to Memphis and race for money, the Memphis racers have to step up for their city.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Doughboy Fresh
programme.desc: When JJ's son, Doughboy, wants to start racing on the street, JJ gets the family and racers together to decide if he's ready. But, with racers from both Mississippi and Missouri coming into town, the Memphis racers have their work cut out for them.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Accidents Happen
programme.desc: When JJ wrecks his truck and trailer on the way home from race night, it nearly destroys both Heifer and Ole Heavy. When Ohio comes to town, the outlaws have to pull together to hustle up as much money as they can to pay for all the broken cars.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: What Happens in Vegas ...
programme.desc: When JJ gets a call from a racer in Vegas asking his guys to come out to race, he can't refuse. With Heifer still down, he has to find himself a car to drive. When the Memphis Street Outlaws finally make it out west, the bets and stakes are high.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Flashlights and Street Fights
programme.desc: The Memphis Outlaws finish their race against the Las Vegas racers, but before they can leave town, they get a call from a group of guys in California looking to race. Memphis agrees to stay to race against Cali, but a brawl breaks out before they start.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Rock N' Roll
programme.desc: With racers from Kentucky coming into town, and Heifer still out of commission, JJ decides to put Tricia behind the wheel of Ziptie. Meanwhile, Mustang Mike is fighting for his first win after his crash.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: JJ's Arm Drop
programme.desc: JJ hosts an arm drop race competition and challenges the legendary racer Birdman on the streets of Memphis.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Chase Is a Race
programme.desc: After an exciting round of racing, it's time to move into round two of JJ's Arm Drop. Many of the Memphis racers are moving on, but that means that now they won't be able to avoid racing each other, and only one can leave with all the money.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Bet on Memphis
programme.desc: JJ's Arm Drop in Las Vegas continues. Memphis lines up against each other for the $30,000 prize.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Pillow Talk: True Colors
programme.desc: Rebecca learns the result of Zied's background check. Avery delivers some devastating news to her mom. Benjamin finally meets Akinyi's father. Angela and Michael try to make amends. Darcey and Tom's relationship takes an interesting turn in Albania.

programme.title: Unexpected: Don't Give Your Baby Steak
programme.desc: Shelly meets her granddaughter, despite McKayla's wishes she stay away. Amidst tension with Alex's family, Tyra reconnects with some old friends. Hailey begins to fear childbirth. Chloe gets ready for the prom and Max gets some bad news.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Aspyn's Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Aspyn and Mitch are getting married with bagpipes, kilts and lots of flower girls. It's a perfect day but the officiant has lost his voice and the Browns are stressing because they now have to move to Flagstaff within a month!

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Meet the Joneses
programme.desc: The Joneses try to lower their expenses by putting their home on the market, but leaving for the day with six children in tow is more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: No Time to Play
programme.desc: When Ethan Jones finishes his MBA program, the whole family takes a trip to Baylor University in Waco, Texas for his graduation ceremony.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Make Room for Quints
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle Busby defy all odds by giving birth to the first set of all girl quintuplets in the U.S. After four months in the NICU, the quints come home, and, along with four-year-old sister Blayke, turn Adam and Danielle's lives upside down.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Chaos With Quints
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle struggle to keep up with the demands of the quintuplets while also making time for four-year-old daughter Blayke. Later, a baby photo shoot with the quints turns into pure chaos when Grandma Mimi shows up late to help.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Bomb Went Off
programme.desc: The inside of Phyllis' home is so packed that she can barely move around. Faye, who suffers from COPD, realizes her hoard is killing her.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Is That a Goat?
programme.desc: Retired U.S. Marine, Donny, has been to jail twice because of his hoard. Joyce sees comfort in her doll collection, but others see a creepy obsession.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hockey Player Down
programme.desc: A young girl is mysteriously paralyzed from the waist down; a young man complains of a splitting headache, but his motives seem suspicious; a bride-to-be has appendicitis on her wedding day.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rottweiler in the ER

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.desc: Lainey, Erica and Barry plan a big 'Risky Business' inspired party at her home, just like the movie, while Lainey's dad is out of town. Later, when the party gets out of control, Beverly jumps to the rescue.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Finding a Felon
programme.desc: In Texas, Game Wardens are the guardians of the state's wildlife. Game Warden Herchman saves an owl, while Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up to work a case in an archery-only county. Game Wardens Benge and King investigate a poaching case.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Pelicans and Poachers
programme.desc: On the Gulf, oyster boats and fish retailers are inspected. Outside San Antonio, a poacher is caught after posting pictures. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps and help a pelican in distress.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: In a special episode, game wardens catch those violating the laws of Texas. From keeping deer tied up to selling protected species to illegally hunted alligators, the Texas game wardens are there to serve justice.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware
programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shock on the Bay
programme.desc: On the Gulf, hundreds of sea turtles face death during a cold spell. A tip leads to a raid on a deer poacher in central Texas. Wardens crack down on white-tailed deer hunters throughout the state, but in Southwest Texas, mule deer season is in full swing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.desc: On the Gulf, hundreds of sea turtles face death during a cold spell. A tip leads to a raid on a deer poacher in central Texas. Wardens crack down on white-tailed deer hunters throughout the state, but in Southwest Texas, mule deer season is in full swing.

programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Big Croc Diaries: Special Edition
programme.desc: Steve introduces his favourite crocodiles at Australia Zoo.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Tiny Watchdogs
programme.desc: Featuring Yorkshire terriers, lagotto romagnolos and German shepherds.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Lucifer the Cat
programme.desc: Jackson's in Jersey to help a single mom whose cat, Pickles, is terrifying her kids. The Cat Daddy works with Lucifer, a cat whose devilish food obsession and constant pursuit to eat just might cost him his life.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: Dr. Dee visits a ranch to check on a pack horse named Red, but she has to be careful -- Red kicks like a mule! Dr. Terry and Nicole head to Arctic Village for a remote clinic. Dr. Dee holds down the fort treating a dog with a mass that looks cancerous.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Lucky Break
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a dog with a serious illness. Mel and her daughter rescue a baby squirrel, while Dr. Jeff and Dr. Petra team up to save a beloved cat hit by a car. Dr. Baier gives a rabbit owner a surprise and a tiny dog with a big spirit needs a home.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Black Rhinos
programme.desc: Chester is home to ten critically endangered Black Rhinos. With numbers in the wild dwindling, the zoo's breeding program is a key part of preserving the species. There's concern about Kitani's ability to defend herself after damaging her horn.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Pitz Carlton
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a dehydrated dog in the blazing heat. An anxious, abandoned dog is moved to a new warehouse for dogs with special needs. And, Tia and the twins help a friend of the rescue find the perfect match.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: Tia's son Kanani, and his fiancée M2, prepare for their wedding. Parolee Jammall finds an abandoned dog and asks Mariah for help rescuing it. Plus, a mother and son visit Villalobos hoping to find a new friend for their family dog.

programme.title: Ice Lake Rebels: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: With the winter freeze only days away, Stephan and Allyce struggle to secure the problematic floats that are tilting their houseboat. Meanwhile, newbie’s Iman and Jessica discover that living in a houseboat during freeze-up can be life threatening.

programme.title: Ice Lake Rebels: Fight for Food
programme.desc: Houseboaters scour Great Slave Lake for food and water to survive the winter. Randy's Caribou hunt is threated by a snowmobile fire. Brian and Henry try a power auger to save their fishing business. Stephan and Allyce brave deadly conditions to fish.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: A male FBI agent goes undercover as an oversized, irritable grandmother named Big Momma.

programme.title: Movie: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling cops are sent back to high school where they attempt to blend in to take down a drug ring.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Kiss and Tell
programme.desc: Jamie hosts a Halloween masquerade party at the hotel, complete with prize money for the best costume. When Fancy refuses to be his date, Jamie invites another woman, Chante, to make Fancy jealous. However, Fancy and Chante wear identical costumes.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: A young man trying to make it big in the entertainment industry takes a job at a hotel.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: A Star Is Almost Born
programme.desc: Jamie's dreams of stardom may come true with the arrival of director Ike Yee, who uses the hotel as the setting for his latest movie starring Jackie Chin.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: A Killer Ending
programme.desc: Jamie thinks a hotel guest is a fugitive killer who is eyeing Fancy as his next victim.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: A Thanksgiving to Remember
programme.desc: Jamie's childhood friend Icepick, a flamboyant pro-football star cut by his team on Thanksgiving Day, threatens to jump from a window ledge.

programme.title: A Different World: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Freddie believes that a salesperson is racist when she won't wait on her and Whitley.

programme.title: A Different World: A World Alike
programme.desc: Whitley opposes a handsome and debonair student activist when he organizes a boycott.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pilot

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet London and the Competition

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Faithful and the Faithless

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Class

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Mommie Dearest (Part 1)

programme.title: Gary and His Demons: Gary and His New Life

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People

programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is the human manifestation of social conscience. He spends all his time scrutinizing various people whom he believes are evil, and claims to have the power to shrink his victims to a meagre two feet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trade-Ins

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Captain Sandy's Yachtrageous Moments
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew relive the best and worst moments from three seasons sailing the Mediterranean. They recall unforgettable crews, over-the-top guests and the real action down below.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Too Many Cooks in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Joao confides in Captain Sandy about his heartbreak while promising not to let his emotions get in the way of his work. Chef Mila continues to struggle in the galley, forcing Captain Sandy to make a temporary adjustment. Hannah takes on double duty.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: 99 Problems But a Chef Ain't One
programme.desc: A recording artist charters Sirocco with her family to shoot a music video and uses the crew as her production assistants. Jack begins to develop feelings for Aesha and Joao feels the workload pile up.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Knot Today, Anchors
programme.desc: With Anastasia filling the role as temp chef and lead deckhand Travis helping as her sous chef, the exhausted crew continues to work a person down in each department. Joao acts quickly in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Hail the Queen
programme.desc: Motor yacht Sirocco braces for its most exclusive charter guest yet: The Queen of Versailles. João faces his old demons after a drunken night out as well as an increasingly defiant deck crew. A new third stew joins the boat who has Colin swooning.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time

programme.title: The UnXplained: Bizarre Rituals
programme.desc: We explore the ancient practices that have been considered relics of bygone superstition, and the evidence that they impact the physical world.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysterious Structures
programme.desc: For centuries, archaeologists have tried to figure out how and why structures like the Great Pyramid at Giza, the staircase at Loretto Chapel, and Coral Castle were built.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Unnatural Nature
programme.desc: Many mysteries of planet Earth are far from understood.

programme.desc: Millions of people claimed to have encountered other worldly creatures such as the Mothman, Chupacabra, and the Mongolian Death Worm.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Incredible Survivors
programme.desc: How do some people live through the impossible? Whether it's plane crashes, bearing freezing temperatures, or performing superhuman feats while in danger- remarkable tales of human survival force us to reconsider what we know about our own will to live.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Life Beyond Death
programme.desc: We explore the mystery of what happens to us after we die. Clues may lie in unusual cases of near-death experiences, reincarnation, and how memories can be passed between organ donors and recipients.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Fireflies

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: American Monster: Backyard Daddy

programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Man and His Gun
programme.desc: Michelle has ended her relationship with alcoholic Richard and is looking forward to getting on with her life. But Richard can't let go and as his obsession grows deeper it's clear their lives will be ripped apart by the violent consequences.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Married to the Devil
programme.desc: Christine's life with abusive husband Shane is a constant cycle of fear, humiliation and violence. When she finally escapes with her kids, Shane sets off in pursuit, kicking off a series of terrifying and shocking events leading to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Occult Following
programme.desc: Krystal is a teacher and practicing Pagan living happily with her husband Bill. When she takes part in a local Wiccan-themed TV show, she catches the eye of the show's host. As his keen interest turns into obsession, he vows to claim her as his own.

programme.title: Dateline: A Place on the Sand

programme.title: Dateline: Kidnapped

programme.title: Dateline: Rear Window

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder In The Poconos

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: We'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Tennessee Treasure
programme.desc: The crew rebuilds the Minor Hill cabin in Franklin, Tennessee. Mark Bowe checks out a log cabin addition to an 1806 stone home and then tours a local whiskey distillery built inside a timber-frame barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bank Barn Brawl
programme.desc: The builders head back to Brookville, Pennsylvania, to save the frame of a bank barn that sits dangerously close to a road. Then, Mark visits an old log lodge resort and scouts an amazing timber frame barn built in 1895.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blacksmith Breakroom
programme.desc: The crew build a pioneer blacksmith shop made from reclaimed beams, barnwood and rafters to serve as their office breakroom. Mark helps set up the frame, then a local blacksmith installs the forge and gives the guys an anvil lesson.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: New Hampshire Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the move of a massive 1802 timber frame barn from New Hampshire to South Carolina, from complicated take-down, through an epic build, all the way to the dramatic finish visit.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Split Crew
programme.desc: Half the crew is in Ohio to save a 1830s log home, while the other half is back in West Virginia to tear down an old log barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blacksmith Breakroom
programme.desc: The crew build a pioneer blacksmith shop made from reclaimed beams, barnwood and rafters to serve as their office breakroom. Mark helps set up the frame, then a local blacksmith installs the forge and gives the guys an anvil lesson.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Split Crew

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bank Barn Brawl
programme.desc: The builders head back to Brookville, Pennsylvania, to save the frame of a bank barn that sits dangerously close to a road. Then, Mark visits an old log lodge resort and scouts an amazing timber frame barn built in 1895.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Containables: Container Home Away From Home
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Tatge Job
programme.desc: Evan and Melanie Tatge cannot stand their current bathroom. With a tub they never use taking up space, they both agree a renovation is in order. Due to being amateurs, they run into some problems along the way.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: French Country Revival
programme.desc: A couple calls on Ally to help them celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary by renovating their beloved home. When she starts ripping out the 1920's farmhouse's walls she finds several surprises that slow her progress.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Colonial Castle
programme.desc: Paige and Raf win a two-bedroom, two-bathroom home at auction. After a promising walk-through goes south, they decide to demolish the entire house and build a brand new structure in a Colonial style.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Shaker-style Bungalow
programme.desc: The brothers travel two hours to snag a house. The move will be long and costly so they make the renovation cost effective by building a large add-on and using the original knotty pine for unique design features throughout the house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Arched Abode
programme.desc: Donna and Toni are contacted by a member of a vocal group called the Texas Tenors to see if his home is worth renovating.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a two-bedroom, one-bathroom home at auction they plan to turn into a craftsman-inspired bungalow. Pleased with their purchase, the sisters start the renovation with a large addition and pull out all the stops to get what they want.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Family Friendly Oasis vs. No-Go
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina win a large home that must be moved in two separate trips. The design plan splits the house into a playful kids' side and relaxing parents' wing. Gary's Girls might have hopped too quickly into a new purchase.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Tuscan Abode
programme.desc: Casey & Catrina get a good buy on a 2 bed 1 bath home in Denton, TX. Casey is anticipating an easy move and Catrina wants to build an addition to get more bedroom and bathroom space. Together they decide to draw on the house's original character.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Traditional Tudor
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a large home with pre-existing shiplap and plan to add over 500 square feet to make it more appealing for a family. Unfortunately, after moving the house to their lot, the sisters discover it is in bad shape.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Sophisticated Ranch
programme.desc: Donna and Toni get lucky with a small cottage win in an auction, which they hope to turn into a classy ranch home. Their plans for the space include a sophisticated country style and want a landscape design that syncs with the home's interior.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' Roach-Infested Home vs. Randy's Cabin In The Woods
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a red and green 'Christmas Tree' house, but the presents inside aren't what they wanted. Randy scores a cabin in the woods with tons of character, but it's surrounded by trees.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From West Coast to Wisconsin
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe starts the day off right with breakfast on a stick, and gets to down to business with the pink taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Snack Attack: Over the Moon Pie
programme.desc: Three chefs get their snack on at the 25th Annual RC- Moon Pie Festival in Bell Buckle, Tennessee. In two rounds of competition, they transform the south's favourite snack staple, the MoonPie, into all new dishes to wow the judges.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Eat Like a Local: California
programme.desc: From authentic tacos and first-class pizza to succulent seafood paella and beer can chicken, these dishes all come with a side of great weather, breathtaking scenery and the laid-back vibes of the Golden State.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Eat, Drink, Play
programme.desc: Great food calls for great entertainment, and these places offer spectacles that make memorable side dishes to incredible meals, from Tex-Mex meatballs fueling music fans in Dallas to a comedy show featuring fresh Atlantic seafood in Maine.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Ravioli Revelations
programme.desc: Justine uses her latest culinary skills by making homemade ravioli in the hopes of impressing her sister Chelle.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Diggy's Bolognese Crazy
programme.desc: Rev's son Diggy is a man on the move, but if there is one thing that keeps him coming home it's his craving for his favorite comfort food, chicken bolognese. Justin invites her sister, Aunt Chelle, to help her make more of Diggy's favorite recipes.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Justine's Jazzy Jumbo Gumbo
programme.desc: Each of the Simmons brothers are unique in their own way. Rev's oldest brother, Danny, is a known artist and poet and is just plain cool. This week, Rev and Justine pull a little inspiration from Uncle Danny's artwork to create a Seafood Gumbo with rice.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Grandma Simmons's Shrimp And Rice
programme.desc: Rev teaches his daughter a special recipe from his childhood: his mother's savory Shrimp and Rice. To complete the meal, Justine serves up a side of her Cheddar and Chive Biscuits and a Chocolate Fondue dessert that would have made Momma Evelyn proud.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Kitchen Tails
programme.desc: Justine finagles her way into getting her sister Chelle's secret recipe of hearty braised oxtail.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Justine's parents come over for dinner and her father brings a loaf of homemade bread. After a week of healthy eating. Justine grants Rev a cheat day.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Lovers Delight
programme.desc: Bobby puts together a decadent brunch based entirely around chocolate.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bobby's recent trip to the Emerald Isle was clearly on his mind, when he came up with his succulent and savory Irish style brunch menu. Bobby creates a bountiful family style platter filled with some of Ireland's favorites.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Springtime Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby prepares a perfect springtime brunch for any family gathering. Inspired by hot cross buns, he makes spiced raisin pancakes and rum raisin cream cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Marrakesh Express Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay showcases the amazing spices and flavors of Morocco with this mouth-watering brunch. His menu includes: oatmeal with honey toasted apricots and pistachios; Moroccan eggs with flatbread and goat cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch in Bloom
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay prepares a garden fresh menu using his favorite fruits, vegetables and herbs like strawberry waffles with lemon curd cream, an open faced omelet with herb cream cheese topped with smoked salmon and grilled asparagus.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread-Y for Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby shows us how to get creative with bread. His menu features frittata di pane with broccoli rabe, sausage ricotta, and blueberry-lemon bread pudding muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Deli-Icious Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby tips his hat to his New York roots as he whips up an amazing brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Weekend Staycation
programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oh My, Meat Pie
programme.desc: Alton Brown tells the tale of an ancestor's journey to the New World by way of a curious meat pie shop. He explores the origins and preparation of shepherd's pie and mincemeat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Your Pad or Mine (Thai)
programme.desc: When his trip to Thailand is cancelled at the last minute, Alton sets out to find the next best thing a proper Pad Thai.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Volleyball
programme.desc: Women's

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.
