programme.desc: A man and woman are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Movie: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: An ambitious executive seeks out the perfect ranch for a corporate retreat, but when she stumbles upon a charming cowboy, she is presented with an offer she cannot refuse.

programme.title: Movie: Love on a Limb
programme.desc: A woman takes it up herself to try and save a beloved oak tree after the mayor hires a handsome landscaper to cut it down. She chains herself to it and as the landscaper attempts to wait her out, the tree brings them more than they could have imagined.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Flu Attack (aka The Flu)
programme.desc: A week before an awards ceremony, Blanche, Dorothy and Rose each come down with a nasty flu, which compounds their arguing over who will win a prestigious award.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz and the Schnoz
programme.desc: Roz finally meets the parents of her baby's father and notices a family facial trait.

programme.title: Frasier: The Life of the Party
programme.desc: When Frasier and Niles lament about their love life, Martin suggests a singles party. The Crane boys soon fall for the same woman, while Roz's water breaks and she goes into labour.

programme.title: Frasier: Party, Party
programme.desc: Frasier makes an effort to spend time with a charming woman whom he recently met.

programme.title: Frasier: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: When Frasier stands up for himself, his new station manager has a surprising reaction.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The French Revue
programme.desc: Lucy plays different roles with the goal of crashing Ricky's nightclub show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Redecorating the Mertzes' Apartment
programme.desc: The Ricardos nearly wreck the apartment of their landlord friends, the Mertzes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Too Many Crooks
programme.desc: The police descend on the Ricardo's apartment in the middle of the night.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Changing the Boys' Wardrobe
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel develop a plot to break their husbands' newly-adopted clothing habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic
programme.desc: Dorothy's old friend, Jean comes to Miami for a visit and Dorothy decides not to tell Blanche and Rose that Jean is a lesbian. Then, after spending time with Rose, Jean begins to fall for her.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: 'A Guide to Life: What Would Mary Ann Do?' author Dawn Wells and chef Jamie Gwen visit. Then, Top Chef alum Shirley Chung cooks Beijing-spiced lamb chops.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs.

programme.title: Movie: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: A woman hosts a puppy party and in attendance is a single father. She teaches him the value of adding a puppy to his home, and along the way, they fall in love.

programme.title: Movie: Love by Chance
programme.desc: A woman's mother is obsessed with her lack of love life and secretly sets her up with who she sees as the perfect man, but she just wants to run her restaurant.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Business Ethics
programme.desc: A business ethics seminar gets out of control when Michael lets everyone speak freely about his or her unethical behaviour at work. Meanwhile, Jim makes Dwight comply with the company's 'time theft' policy.

programme.title: The Office: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 30, 2019
programme.desc: Former Gov. Mark Sanford, Republican presidential candidate visits.

programme.title: Lights Out With David Spade: Erin Foster, Sarah Foster and Kevin Nealon
programme.desc: Panelists Erin Foster, Sarah Foster and Kevin Nealon join David Spade to talk about the latest in pop culture.

programme.title: The Jim Jefferies Show: September 24, 2019
programme.desc: The Jim Jefferies Show is here to shake up the humdrum formula of the political late-night show. Jim tackles the news of the day with no-bulls**t candor, piercing insight and a uniquely Aussie viewpoint.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners

programme.title: South Park: South Park Is Gay!
programme.desc: The boys are hot to be gay once the metrosexual craze hits South Park. Meanwhile, Mr. Garrison accuses the Queer Eye guys of selling out.

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger

programme.desc: Fall collection from Talbots; Family Circle's guide to healthy snacks; Broadway Across America: Miss Saigon.

programme.title: The Closer: To Protect and Serve
programme.desc: A murder hits close to home when a dead body is discovered in Detective Lt. Provenza's garage. When Provenza and Flynn want to make it to a Dodgers game on time, the body disappears and the Homicide Division tries to cover its negligence.

programme.title: The Closer: Out of Focus
programme.desc: When a paparazzi photographer appears to have killed himself by jumping out of a hotel window, Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson is called in to investigate. Fritz is getting calls from a female colleague, which makes Brenda jealous.

programme.title: The Closer: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Brenda starts an investigation when severed body parts are found in the dumpster. The victim is a popular porn star who also happens to have HIV+. Many of the co-stars may have also been exposed to HIV.

programme.title: The Closer: Critical Missing
programme.desc: A woman and her young daughter bob up, tied together from the bottom of the harbour. The team has to reverse their usual methods of solving crimes and work their way backwards in this strange mystery.

programme.title: The Closer: Heroic Measures
programme.desc: A woman's son dies during surgery and Deputy Police Chief Brenda Johnson is called in.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Patrick/ Leierwood
programme.desc: A conservative, pro-war, former military mom who runs her house like a boot camp swaps lives with a peace activist who runs her house like a training camp for liberals.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Downs/ Bailey
programme.desc: A career-obsessed workaholic mom trades places with a child-obsessed protective mom.

programme.title: Movie: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: After a musician is dumped by his actress girlfriend, he travels to Hawaii to heal. When he arrives in Hawaii, he discovers that his ex and her new boyfriend are staying at the same resort.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Bad Boyz For Life
programme.desc: The Memphis family meets up with another group of Memphis racers, the 901 Bad Boyz, for a night of grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Big Brawls
programme.desc: Memphis starts the racing season against a friendly group of racers from Illinois, but after just 3 races, rain comes and ends the night. JJ sets up another race night with a group from Detroit, but this group isn't quite as friendly.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Memphis vs. The Rock City
programme.desc: With insider facts and extra footage: Race night continues as Memphis risks it all to win against the loudmouth group from Detroit. The first city to win 7 races wins the entire cash pot.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Everyone Pays
programme.desc: A group of racers from Indiana come to race the Memphis family. JJ has to keep his son calm when the racers get dishonest. Gulley is back racing after a crash. Then, Memphis heads to Ohio to meet up with a group who's got flashy cars and deep pockets.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: United We Stand
programme.desc: No Prep Kings is back, and this season the gloves are off and the friendships are over. The 405 decides to team up to try to take the Championship, while Texas and NOLA racers rally to do the same.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: From Airstrip to Street
programme.desc: Racers move into round two of JJ's family friendly arm drop at Speedy's Strip, and the outlaws are representing well against competitors from all over. When rain moves in quickly and puts the race on hold, JJ decides to finish on the street.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Everyone Pays
programme.desc: A group of racers from Indiana come to race the Memphis family. JJ has to keep his son calm when the racers get dishonest. Gulley is back racing after a crash. Then, Memphis heads to Ohio to meet up with a group who's got flashy cars and deep pockets.

programme.desc: Racers move into round two of JJ's family friendly arm drop at Speedy's Strip, and the outlaws are representing well against competitors from all over. When rain moves in quickly and puts the race on hold, JJ decides to finish on the street.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Brace For Impact
programme.desc: Rick and crew fight to get as much gold as they can before they're shut down. Tony races to finish his second dredge and Parker makes a risky move.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: On target for an $8.4-million-dollar season, Parker's wash plant catches fire. Rick finishes his first season strong. Tony heads into the wilderness to find lost equipment to get his ancient dredge running. Followed by a special aftershow of 'The Dirt.'

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to the Future
programme.desc: An extended sneak peek of the all-new season of Gold Rush reveals a crisis in the Klondike forcing the miners in new directions. We go back to the beginning, nine years ago, revealing the pivotal moments that got each man to the crossroads they now face.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Dozer Dave Returns
programme.desc: Dave Turin, a former 'Gold Rush' miner, sets out on his own prospecting for an abandoned gold mine to reopen. When an investor backs out, Dave has to decide if he's willing to risk his family's life savings on his ability to bring home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery
programme.desc: Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why. With his season hanging in the balance, the pressure mounts for Dave to get them back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Bering Sea is now the Wild West as Shawn and Kris battle encroaching miners. Ken's beastly Myrtle Irene continues to invade and operating costs soar. Emily expands her operation but an air malfunction threatens her season.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Over the Line
programme.desc: Shawn and Kris wield brute strength and verbal threats to stand their ground as raging competition forces captains to change tactics. Emily and George use brainpower, gambling on new strategies and resources.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Storm Surge
programme.desc: The approach of a violent storm pits safety against the will to succeed. Ken rushes to free the Myrtle before it's destroyed. Kris risks being stranded. Shawn mines until the Bering Sea rips up his dredge. Emily attempts to appease nature.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Second Wind

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chelsea and Charles

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Felicia
programme.desc: Young couples take their online-only romantic relationships offline and meet in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mary and Adam

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rachael and Vance
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Kamie Crawford fly to Iowa to help Rachael meet Vance, her decade long Myspace romance. But as they dig into Vance’s past, Rachael is left wondering if he really is the man she spent half her life in love with.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Marvin and Austin

programme.desc: The four bakers must beware of evil spells as Duff Goldman provides cursed ingredients. The final three head to their home bakeries to construct elaborate showpiece cakes that transform from calm to cursed.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Most Monstrous Scares
programme.desc: For more than half of a decade, the world's greatest pumpkin carvers, cake artists and sugar artists have made terrifying Halloween creations. We revisit the most monstrous scares, greatest heartbreaks, trickiest treats and amazing designs of all time.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extra Spooky: Halloween Invasion
programme.desc: John Henson kicks off the competition by revealing all the skeletons in his family's closet to inspire the eight bakers as they make scary skeleton desserts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Marshmallow Madness
programme.desc: The chefs get creative by incorporating marshmallows into their lunch. Next, the chefs must create taco night out of Guy's grocery list.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Birthday
programme.desc: On tour, Trisha Yearwood's husband, Garth, celebrated her birthday in a big way. Now, at home, her birthday wish is to spend a quiet day with him doing the cooking. Garth makes Double French Toast for breakfast, and then a romantic lunch.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tailgating
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes her family out to the ballgame! With help from her sister, Beth, and nephew, Bret, Trisha makes "Go Dawgs!" greens, baked chicken tenders and easy blueberry pie bars.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Football, Friends and Comfort Food
programme.desc: Trisha has her girlfriends over for their Sunday tradition of football, food, and friends. The menu includes sausage hors d'oeuvres, cheese dip with corn chips, chilli with sour cream corn bread and green punch.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Open House Tailgate
programme.desc: Trisha prepares some tasty treats including a giant hoagie, sweet tots, loaded pizza dip and dessert nachos for a tailgate at her house. Plus, pro football player DeMarco Murray swings by!

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Harlem Globetrotters
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her friend, Glenda, welcome a trio of Harlem Globetrotters -- Hoops, Bull and Moose -- for lunch in exchange for some famous Globetrotter trick lessons.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Jewish New Year
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's family is in town to celebrate Rosh Hashana, the Jewish new year, and she makes a fabulous brunch to mark the occasion. They'll love her sweet apple butter rolls with honey marzipan frosting.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Big Game, Big Food!
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking mega with big food for the big game. She kicks things off with her bodacious burger, a stacked sandwich with tiers of quick and easy mac and cheese, onion Strings and terrific toppings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Football Camp
programme.desc: Find out what Ree's making for 120 hungry coaches and kids.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Smoothie Operators

programme.title: Chopped: Frankly Frantic

programme.title: Your World
programme.desc: Neil Cavuto presents the top business stories of the day and analyses how the headlines will affect the markets.

programme.title: Missouri Mountain Family: Welcome to the Family
programme.desc: After a harsh winter and near-fatal accident, the Haumessers struggle to get back on track and begin projects that keep the homestead running. The largest project being a field burn to enrich the soil, and it'll take everyone to get the job done safely.

programme.title: Missouri Mountain Family: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Spring has arrived on the homestead and with that comes new life and a lot of hard work. As Isaac and Emily prepare to get married, the family helps them build their new house before the big day. Of course, nothing ever goes as planned on the farm.

programme.title: Missouri Mountain Family: One Step at a Time
programme.desc: It's hard work keeping a two-hundred acre homestead running, but it's even more difficult taking care of the little things that get neglected. The families take a break from the large projects and focus on their own home sites.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: Steve Irwin takes us on a frozen adventure to Antarctica to interact with amazing wildlife. He goes tobogganing with penguins, encounters notoriously dangerous leopard seals and swims with two curious humpback whales.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Man's Land
programme.desc: It's fall in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge, and that means animals are on the move. Heimo pursues the tail end of the caribou migration, a bear ransacks Bob's cabin, destroying 2 years of dry meat, and the Lewis family arrives to sign of moose.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunted
programme.desc: Surviving 400 miles from civilization boils down to one thing, finding food. Heimo pursues a moose, which can feed him and Edna for months. The condition of Bob's boat threatens the hunt. The Seldens arrive to a flooded cabin.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Winter's wrath is nearing and to prepare for the unforgiving season when temperatures drop to -50 degrees, everyone must fight to stay alive.

programme.desc: A former adopter comes back to Villalobos to find a companion to support her through her battle with cancer. The VRC crew join efforts to rescue an injured stray near the warehouse. And Tia puts a new parolee through his paces.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Down, Not Out
programme.desc: After Tia suffers a devastating injury, her kids have to step up to keep Villalobos running. Everyone's help is needed to catch an elusive dog in the middle of the night. And, a family of 8 needs a new companion to complete their active home.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett confront a hunter they suspect illegally shot a pheasant. Officer Egan receives a call from a Canadian hunter who shot a moose that crossed the border. And, a community unites in the search for a missing teenager.

programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too

programme.title: Snapped: Janice Dodson
programme.desc: A newlyweds hunting trip becomes lethal when a woman finds her husband shot dead, sending investigators to track a muddy trail of bullet holes, deception, and dirty laundry left by a devious murderer.

programme.title: Snapped: Pamela Lanier
programme.desc: A woman's innocence is called into question after her husband dies from a mysterious malady and encourages detectives to take a deep dive into her past.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Chelsi Griffin & Alex Turner
programme.desc: A young woman finds herself the target of a murder investigation after she befriends a mysterious man who claims to be a secret agent with a license to kill.

programme.desc: When a charming motocross champ meets an ambitious model, young love blooms. The happy couple ties the knot in Las Vegas, never knowing their wedding vows will trigger a mysterious murder plot, and a decades-long investigation.

programme.desc: When a man is ambushed by a firestorm of bullets outside his home, investigators follow a twisted trail of suspects to a vindictive mastermind.

programme.desc: The slaying of an investigative reporter takes the detectives to the governor's office.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon becomes the prime suspect after he reports his addicted wife missing.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Looking Out for Stateville
programme.desc: Voight convinces Deputy Crowley to bring in his former cellmate, Eddie, as a CI for the unit in order to help bring down a big-time cocaine supplier and his local dealers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Hit Me
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in an effort to track down a rogue police officer targeting women leaving a local casino.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates
programme.desc: Gregory Yates escapes from prison and the team learns he intends to flee to New York. The SVU team informs Intelligence that he has been gathering information on Lindsay.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl
programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Justice
programme.desc: After a hooded man opens fire on their patrol car, Roman is left wounded and Burgess takes off after the shooter. No gun is found at the crime scene and the victim is a 17-year-old honour student who will likely never walk again.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Looking Out for Stateville
programme.desc: Voight convinces Deputy Crowley to bring in his former cellmate, Eddie, as a CI for the unit in order to help bring down a big-time cocaine supplier and his local dealers.

programme.title: Movie: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
programme.desc: Two brothers place an ad seeking dates to their sister's wedding. They find two girls, who secretly just want a free trip. The girls pretend to be respectable, but once they get to Hawaii, the brothers realize they are extremely wild and unhinged.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moms I'd Like to Forget
programme.desc: During a game of dodgeball, Bart discovers that a classmate has the same scar on his hand that he does. Puzzled by the matching blemishes, he asks Marge about it, who explains that she and her girlfriends formed 'The Cool Moms' club years earlier.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Flaming Moe
programme.desc: When Smithers offers to help transform Moe's dingy pub into a more refined and trendy lounge, the revamped Mo's quickly becomes Springfield's local gay hangout.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Father
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a 1980s family sitcom and models his parenting skills after the show's sensible father, much to Bart's chagrin.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Blue and the Gray
programme.desc: After spending another Valentine's Day alone, Moe attends a seminar to gain more confidence with women. Moe takes the doctor's advice and asks Homer to be his wingman, but then becomes distraught when women are drawn to Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Angry Dad: The Movie
programme.desc: Bart's cartoon about an angry dad is turned into a movie and quickly becomes a critics' favourite. When Russell Brand presents the Golden Globe to Bart's film, Homer usurps the podium and gives his own acceptance speech.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Scorpion's Tale
programme.desc: At a field trip, Lisa discovers that desert water mysteriously makes combative creatures get along, so she brings some of the water home as a souvenir. When Grampa moves in, Homer secretly tests the desert water on Grampa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Midsummer's Nice Dream
programme.desc: The town is abuzz when Cheech and Chong announce a Springfield stop on their much-anticipated reunion tour. When Chong is unable to perform, Homer steps in and delivers all the jokes by heart. Impressed, Cheech invites Homer to go on tour with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is a Many Strangled Thing
programme.desc: When Homer inadvertently humiliates Bart in front of a stadium crowd, Marge encourages Homer to enroll in a fathering enrichment class taught by therapist Dr. Zander.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Simpsina
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a magician's apprentice to the legendary Great Raymondo, who helps her develop her craft. A schoolgirl crush clouds her judgment when she is coaxed into revealing the Great Raymondo's most famous magic trick to his phony arch nemesis.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Fat Tony and Selma are in love and get married after a whirlwind courtship. To ease Marge's reservations about the marriage, Fat Tony invites Homer and Marge to a weekend getaway at the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Scissorhands
programme.desc: When Homer discovers a genius talent for styling hair and opens his own salon, he becomes Springfield's most in-demand hair stylist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 500 Keys
programme.desc: When the Simpsons discover a collection of keys, which open every door in Springfield, Lisa stumbles upon an eerie hidden classroom beneath Springfield Elementary School.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Hundred Dollar Baby
programme.desc: After Dee gets mugged, she agrees to take boxing lessons from Frank, who is thrilled with the idea of reliving his glory days as a professional fighter. Meanwhile, Mac and Dennis plan to make some cash by entering Charlie in underground fighting matches.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gives Back
programme.desc: After the arson mishap gets them arrested, Charlie, Mac, Dennis and Dee are sentenced to community service. During their services, Charlie makes another attempt to win The Waitress' affection when he discovers that they share something in common.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Exploits a Miracle
programme.desc: When a leaky pipe creates a water stain on the wall at Paddy's that resembles the likeness of the Virgin Mary, the gang argues over the best way to exploit their little 'miracle.'

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Runs for Office
programme.desc: The gang explores the corrupt world of local Philly politics when Frank explains how easy it is to elicit bribes from politicians.

programme.desc: Ride shotgun with snake catcher Simon Keys and herpetologist girlfriend, Siouxsie Gillett, as they rush across Snake City.

programme.title: Snake City: Venomous Encounters
programme.desc: Ride shotgun with snake-catcher Simon Keys and herpetologist girlfriend, Siouxsie Gillett, as they rush across Snake City in response to screams of terror, from deadly black mambas in wardrobes to cobras in factories.

programme.title: Snake City: Tunnel of Doom
programme.desc: Simon mud wrestles a mamba. A cobra's hiding in a toilet. A whip snake loses its tail.

programme.title: Snake City: Storm of Snakes
programme.desc: Dogs, spitting cobras, and Siouxsie don't mix.

programme.title: Snake City: Humungosaur
programme.desc: Siouxsie is almost bitten by a black mamba. A girl is bitten by a cobra while she was asleep.

programme.title: Snake City: Hot and Bothered
programme.desc: A huge black mamba gets trapped inside a dark roof and a dog is sprayed in the eyes.

programme.title: Snake City: Mamba Mama
programme.desc: A black mamba shares a man's bedroom. A pregnant green mamba is hard to catch.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth: Venus's Evil Twin
programme.desc: There is a hellish planet in our solar system, covered in thick dense clouds and roasted by colossal temperatures. Incredibly this is a vision of Earth's future. To understand how our world will be destroyed we need to look at Earth's evil twin Venus.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth: Venus's Evil Twin
programme.desc: There is a hellish planet in our solar system, covered in thick dense clouds and roasted by colossal temperatures. Incredibly this is a vision of Earth's future. To understand how our world will be destroyed we need to look at Earth's evil twin Venus.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey from the Center of the Sun
programme.desc: Discover how light escapes from the sun, from its fiery birth through its 430,000 mile battle against gravity and magnetism to its escape from the solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Spacetime
programme.desc: Spacetime, the secret structure that controls our universe, is a strange four-dimensional substance that controls time, light, and energy, and will also determine how our universe will end.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford
programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Maze Prison
programme.desc: The Maze Prison held Catholic and Protestant prisoners, along with paramilitary groups.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase
programme.desc: North Carolina author Michael Peterson was convicted of murdering his wife for her insurance money.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Animal Instinct
programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Those We Rely On
programme.desc: It's an emotional night on the Nightwatch in New Orleans as one EMS officer tells his partner that this is their last night on the job.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Nichols
programme.desc: Suffering from loneliness while living in the isolated Rocky Mountains, Dan and Don Nichols kidnap a local female and try to convince her to become Dan's bride.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Twisted Plan
programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Primal Instincts
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day and first-time mom Tennyson Jacobson is looking forward to celebrating with her family. But when she spends her daughter's naptime fighting off a violent intruder, Tennyson can't shake the feeling he'll soon be back to strike again.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Home Invasion
programme.desc: 26-year-old Julie Curry Boyd took the steps to separate her and her children from a marriage of 13 years. A sudden threat finds Julie desperate but determined to keep her family safe.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: A Date with Death
programme.desc: After a draining divorce, 56-year-old Deborah Houchin turns to online dating. When she meets fellow psychologist Lester Winningham, the two hit it off immediately. But when Deborah disappears mysteriously, her coworkers are determined to crack the case.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: A Date with Death
programme.desc: After a draining divorce, 56-year-old Deborah Houchin turns to online dating. When she meets fellow psychologist Lester Winningham, the two hit it off immediately. But when Deborah disappears mysteriously, her coworkers are determined to crack the case.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Home Invasion
programme.desc: 26-year-old Julie Curry Boyd took the steps to separate her and her children from a marriage of 13 years. A sudden threat finds Julie desperate but determined to keep her family safe.

programme.title: Diabolical: The Rich Get Richer
programme.desc: Penny Knell is admitted to a special care facility, where a devious mastermind is waiting to prey upon society's most vulnerable. When Penny's family gets caught in her web, the consequences will be fatal.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: A father of three is murdered in his own home, stabbed 32 times with an X carved into his neck.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Film director Adrienne Shelly is discovered hanging by a bed sheet from the shower rod in her bathroom. It looks like a suicide, but her husband insists it was murder. And detectives are starting to believe him...

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: A Bronx house fire reveals a charred body inside. Police learn it's 20-year-old Kimberly Antonakos, and she's been burned alive. Was it her ex-boyfriend, Psycho? Or is her father connected to the mob? The truth is far more tragic.

programme.title: Suspicion: Cosy Cove Killings
programme.desc: In 2007 Monique Murdoch's lakeside idyll is shattered when an intruder steals her daughter's underwear. However this is just a start, young women go missing and fear stalks the Canadian countryside.

programme.title: Suspicion: Designing Murder
programme.desc: In 1984 a beautiful and intelligent college student is found raped and murdered in her own Dallas condo. The tragic event inspires her best friend to risk her own life in pursuit of the killer and justice. It's a heart-wrenching real life who dunnit.

programme.title: Suspicion: Edge of Insanity
programme.desc: Toni Ingram's 19 year old daughter, Morgan is creative and funny. Threatening behavior quickly escalates into stalking. Toni and her husband are thrown into a desperate race to unmask their daughter's nemesis before everything they hold dear is destroyed.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: She spent 11 years in prison. But did Noura Jackson really murder her mother? The one-time party girl speaks out about the evidence that put her behind bars, the court decision that set her free, and suspicions that turned her own family against her.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Golden Girl Gone Wrong
programme.desc: A serial killer targeting women is loose in Canyon Lake, CA. When the killer is finally caught, no one can believe the face or motives behind the cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: 20/20: A Case of 'Affluenza'
programme.desc: A privileged 16 year old with a troubled past, killed four innocent people while driving drunk. The defense team argument the teen suffered from 'affluenza'. This strategy worked and the teen did not go to jail.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: A 15-year-old girl relies on Facebook to stay in contact and keep up with the latest gossip. After accepting a few friend requests from boys she doesn't know, Nichole agrees to meet one of them and discovers the truth behind their online friendship.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Traditional Residence
programme.desc: The Snow sisters battle a tough auction to win a three-bed, one-bath home. At another auction, Randy wins a small garage-like structure, but has to give up on his plan to turn it into a guesthouse after he injures his leg.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Airy Atrium vs. the Snows' Raised Roof
programme.desc: The Snows and Randy go to two auctions in one day. After Randy snags the first house, he and the Snows devise a plan to join together. They end up with two separate builds and literally split a house between them.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Rural Refurb vs. Gary's Girls' Quaint Cottage
programme.desc: Catrina gets a bargain on a couple of houses from a house mover and plans to make one a main house and the other a guest house. She invites Gary's Girls to work with her and Casey to create a cohesive rustic design for both.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1901 Printer's House
programme.desc: Tim helps a Jerome, Arizona, homeowner tackle an overwhelming restoration. He peels back decades of bad renovations to uncover clues that influence the direction of the build and solve the mystery of the home's original owner.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: No Use Crying Over Spilt Paint
programme.desc: Marissa and Johan, an Orlando-based husband and wife duo, have decided to flip their first house. But the deeper they get into their renovations, the more they realize they might not be able to pull off this flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Shiplap and Mishaps
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife flipping team Robert and Tobi have decided to renovate a historic home in New Jersey.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Stilts and Stones May Break the Budget
programme.desc: Husband and wife flipping team, Christine and Greg, decide to flip an enormous house by the beach in southern New Jersey. The flip starts to spiral out of control when Christine's expensive taste interferes with Greg's strict budget.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Sweat Equity
programme.desc: First time flipper Jeneane decides to partner with her seemingly experienced boyfriend, Eric. As the flip progresses, Jeneane realizes that Eric may not have as much construction experience as she thought.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Texas Two Flip
programme.desc: High school sweethearts flip their first house, and in order to save money, they are going to live in it as they renovate. The longer the flip goes on, the more they both want it to end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Nashville Novices
programme.desc: Leland is flipping a house in his hometown of Nashville, Tennessee, and has asked his parents Evy and Bob to help him with the renovations. With Leland splitting time between California and Nashville, they struggle to complete the house on time.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Toddlers and Timelines
programme.desc: Jackie and Eric’s original timeline of three months for their flip is unexpectedly cut down to one month when Eric gets a job offer in another state. The flip is made increasingly difficult with their three toddlers at the job site.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Cabinet Catastrophe
programme.desc: Newlyweds Tori and Lee decide to flip a huge house in Denver, but they quickly realize they're in over their heads. Each project becomes more complicated than the last. With the budget snowballing, they question if they can finish the project.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Communication Is Turnkey
programme.desc: A young married couple flips a house in South Bend, Indiana and struggles to communicate during the flip. He has more experience and gets frustrated with his wife's lack of construction knowledge. She gets upset when he fails to explain the projects.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Competitive Construction
programme.desc: A competitive couple tries to turn each renovation project into a game to determine which one of them is the best flipper. The young duo soon realizes that construction is not all fun and games and they've got to get serious to get this flip done.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Stepping Up the Living Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to a rundown cottage in need of major rejuvenation in Lake Orion, Michigan. Starting with the living room, she rips out an old staircase and uses an old door to tie the rooms together, making the space look grand.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Laundering Around
programme.desc: Nicole is challenged to fix the back extension of the rundown cottage in Lake Orion, Michigan. The space is too small to be a garage, so she comes up with a plan to fit laundry, a bathroom and an inviting entryway into this small area.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson runs down a day full of the best comfort food in the world.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Serious Sandwiches

programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale

programme.desc: Pearl goes through a growth spurt; after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.desc: Chandler shares a torrid kiss with Joey's girlfriend and Ross plays keyboard again.

programme.title: Mom: Free Therapy and a Dead Lady's Yard Sale

programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.
